form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Comes off a 30 day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by 0.5 len at this track Hcp March 15 over 1000m on a heavy track defeating Demon Award with 59.5kg at $2.05. The race before that favourite; scored a big 5 len win at Home Hill Sw February 14 over 1180m on a soft track defeating Real Key with 61.5kg at $1.40. Will again prove tough to stop at this favoured circuit.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in for a short distance after leaving the barriers.
Jumped out at the start and bumped with Northern Express.
Began awkwardly.
Blundered on jumping away however recovered quickly to settle on pace.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by 1.2 len at Cairns Hcp April 4 over 950m in the wet defeating Impardoo with 61.5kg at $5. The run before that 3rd of 8 at Cairns Hcp on March 26 over 1250m, on heavy track; 5 len behind Armour Force with 62kg at $12. In the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride.
Shifted in marginally near the winning post hampering Highbar.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four months. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Canterbury 5yo+ Bm72 December 19 over 1200m, 7 len behind Zulfiqar carrying 60kg at $13. First up last campaign third of 8 at Wyong Prov Bm68 October 30 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Oceans One carrying 61kg at $6. In the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin.
Bumped on jumping. Raced wide without cover throughout.
Jumped inwards at the start impeding Just Super.

form.formComment: At the latest run failed to make an impression; second last of 8 at Cairns Hcp on March 26 over 1250m, on heavy track; 16 len behind Armour Force with 58.5kg at $4. The run before that came from midfield and won by 0.8 len at this track Hcp March 5 over 1400m in soft going defeating Prince Akeem with 53.5kg at $3.70. Goes well here and is sure to prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Got its head in the air nearing the 1000m when being restrained.
Inclined to lay in under pressure over the final 100m.
Jumped out at the start making heavy contact with Sir Rocket.
Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 3 len at this track Bm75 March 31 over 1200m defeating Sand 'N' Power with 54.5kg at $2.80. The race before that raced on the pace when 3rd of 9 at this track Hcp on March 15 over 1000m, on heavy track; 1.2 len behind Roweiner's Dance carrying 54kg at $7. Draws a nice barrier and will be very competitive again.

Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 46-day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 10 at this track Bm72 on February 27 over 1000m, slow going 2.75 len behind Cole's Best with 61.5kg at $41. Before that 5th of 8 at this track Hcp on February 3 over 1000m, slow going 5.5 len behind Roweiner's Dance carrying 54kg at $14. Very hard to entertain.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming faded in the straight 6th of 8 at Cairns Hcp on March 12 over 950m, on heavy track; 1.1 len behind Valenki with 54.5kg at $4.40. Second-up ran last of 10 at Cairns Bm70 on March 26 over 950m, on rain affected going; 10 len behind Ruby Chicks carrying 60kg at $13. Looking elsewhere.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the home straight.
Laid in throughout the final straight proving difficult to ride.
Travelled 4 wide throughout; crowded for room passing the 700m.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months from last on the turn second last of 10 at this track 0 - 60 on March 31 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Lowlands with 52.5kg at $101. Previously second-up second last of 7 at Ewan 0 - 60 on October 19 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Room For Squares with 55.5kg at $16. Needs something easier.
